Vocabulary - निरशनम् इष्टसिध्दिपर्यन्तम् अपि | Story 7

13 Apr 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
कूप well
गत्वा having gone
सिद्ध ready / prepared
उन्नीय to be led upwards
बहिः out of / outside
निःक्षिप्य having thrown away or spent
भवतः your
शताधिक exceeding a hundred
तदीय his / her / its / their
खनन digging into the earth
निरशन fasting
मनोभव imaginary

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
गत्वा शयनं करोतु Go and sleep
तत्र गत्वा किं करोति? What are you going to do there?
इदानीं गत्वा किञ्चित् पठतु Go and read now.
   
सिद्धता कथम् अस्ति? How is your preparation?
भोजनं सिद्धम् वा ? Is the food ready?
पाकः तदानीं एव सिद्धः Food is ready a while ago itself.
   
कृपया एतद् बहिः क्षिपतु Please, throw this away.
सः सङ्गणकं बहिर्गच्छति He logs off the computer.
बहिः गतवान् , इदानीम् आगच्छति He has gone out, he will be back soon.
   
भवतः वचनं सत्यम् You are right.
भवता एतद् न कर्तव्यम् You should not do this.
भवतः आभिप्रायः किम् ? What is your opinion?
भवतः जलम् आवश्यकं वा ? Would you like a glass of water?
अद्य भवतः कार्यक्रमः कः? What are your programmes for today?

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
